title: The Beginning
subtitle: A dream takes root
description: With determination and a vision for better living, Allbright Home Services was founded in 1976. What started as a small, family-run cleaning venture quickly became known for hard work, trust, and quality service.

title: The First Carpet Cleaning Van
subtitle: Innovation hits the road
description: In 1985, Allbright rolled out its first professional carpet cleaning van. This wasn’t just a vehicle—it was a bold step toward innovation, convenience, and reliability for every customer.

title: From One Van to a Fleet
subtitle: Growing with our community
description: By the early 1990s, Allbright grew from one van into a fleet serving thousands of homes and businesses. Our bright vans became a symbol of trust and quality throughout the Bay Area.

title: Our People, Our Strength
subtitle: The heart of Allbright
description: The real strength of Allbright has always been its people. In 1995, our growing team carried forward the values of dedication, care, and professionalism—treating every home as if it were their own.

title: Building a Legacy
subtitle: A new generation leads forward
description: By 2012, Allbright had become more than a cleaning company—it was a legacy. This era reflected a new generation of leadership, a stronger commitment to professionalism, and a vision for the future.

title: 48 Years Strong
subtitle: Blending tradition with innovation
description: Today, Allbright continues to live by its founding belief: “Cleaning for Better Living.” We bring together decades of expertise with eco-friendly solutions, modern equipment, and concierge-level care.

title: Looking Ahead
subtitle: Our story continues
description: Our story is still unfolding. As we continue to expand, one thing remains unchanged: our promise to serve with integrity, professionalism, and care—just as we did back in 1976.
